activities.locationEn: La Baie Park South Parking Lot
activities.titleZh: 夏末中国烟花桨板之夜
activities.summaryZh: 夏末夜晚的桨板活动，风景优美，适合轻松娱乐。
activities.summaryEn: An evening paddle with beautiful views, perfect for a relaxed outing.

activities.titleZh: 仲夏夜夜走 | 赏渥太华夜景。
activities.summaryZh: 夜走又回来啦，这次我们去西部小屋，夜走+火锅或者泡面，轻松路线，适合新手。
activities.summaryEn: A classic ridge route with reliable views and steady climbing.

activities.titleZh: 仲夏夜夜骑 | 夜色加蒂诺
activities.summaryEn: A classic ridge route with reliable views and steady climbing.

activities.summaryZh: 本活动采用坐标点定位，无 GPX 轨迹，适合新成员地图找点练习。
activities.summaryEn: This activity uses a single coordinate point without a GPX track, ideal for new members to practice map-based meetup.

activities.locationZh: 渥太华河 Guillot park - Britannia Beach 段
activities.locationEn: Ottawa River Guillot park - Britannia Beach
activities.titleZh: 水哥组织的年度游泳横渡渥太华河
activities.titleEn: Annual Ottawa River Swim Crossing by Waterwalker
activities.summaryZh: 群主作为保障船，带领大家从 Guillot park 游泳到 Britannia Beach，仅适合有经验的游泳者。
activities.summaryEn: The organizer acts as a safety boat, leading participants from Guillot park to Britannia Beach, suitable only for experienced swimmers.
